Mask of Obtenebration  
 

Lore Item
Slot: FACE
Charges: Unlimited
AC: 6
CHA: +8 AGI: +6
Effect: Illusion Erudite (Any Slot/Can Equip, Casting Time: 6.0) at Level 15
WT: 0.4 Size: SMALL
Class: BRD ROG
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Mask of Obtenebration
Lore Item
Slot: FACE
Charges: Unlimited
AC: 6
CHA: +8 AGI: +6
Effect: Illusion Erudite (Any Slot/Can Equip, Casting Time: 6.0) at Level 15
WT: 0.4 Size: SMALL
Class: BRD ROG
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)

Item Type:Illusion
Stackable:No
Merchant Value:52 pp 0 gp 0 sp 0 cp
Tribute:944

Source:Live

Expansion: Ruins of Kunark

Rarity: Very Rare

This item is found on creatures.

Howling Stones (Charasis)

Post Comment
still drops and wasnt that long
QuoteReply
# Sep 08 2013 at 5:45 AM Rating: Good
Sonicmurphy
Sage
63 posts
hiya everyone,
just wanted to let ya'll know the mask still drops from said named spent 4 to 4 1/2 hours there first 3 or so hours no named spawned at all just PH's then had 3 back to back named the first 2 named didnt drop mask the 3rd one dropped it so wasnt too bad ..
▲ Page top
Still drops 6/14/2013
QuoteReply
# Jun 14 2013 at 6:29 AM Rating: Decent
Vanelar
7 posts
Got it today, very easy to get (or I was very lucky!)

When you zone in, it is very straightforward; take the west door, avoid the tiny carpet (trap) and go all the way until you see the exit, and kill everything in the area.

When I got there, the mob was up, and it dropped first shot!

Good luck!
▲ Page top
Still drops
QuoteReply
# Apr 09 2012 at 4:21 PM Rating: Decent

35 posts
Mask still drops as of 4-9-12, took quite a few spawns to get it.

dropped today on P

# May 07 2010 at 1:02 PM Rating: Decent
Wuolf
45 posts
Didn't know it was this name mob till I saw the mask, he spawned right in front of the portal stone, at the end of the west wing, top floor. server
Prexus (Terris-Thule)
Was just fighting with SK 56 and Druid 57 when this dropped
Dropped off Skeletal Procurator
he also dropped Broken Sacrificial Blade and flawed defiant leather cap

hmmm i definatly think this has been nerfed, i normally camp this and it was pretty easy/common but now the tarnished gold plate vambraces are its common and this mask is the rare, also his spawn rate seem slower, can anyone verify?

mask
QuoteReply
# Nov 04 2003 at 5:56 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592260109248
11 posts


This mask does (usually) increase faction with Overthere. I have tried it. I have one. No I'm not thinking of Mask of Decption (which works even better).

Also, the charm of being an Erudite wears off kinda fast. Its fun for the first day, then not being able to see really doesn't make up for the uniqueness.

Using it on my bard at night in OT to remove KOS factor with dragoons in OT. Can also trade in the city while in illusion de.

# Feb 15 2003 at 1:39 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591757034178
44 posts
Um? OT in ERUDITE form is not going to help you. You may be thinking of the Mask of Deception from Assassin camp in LGuk.

RE: Good for OT hunting
QuoteReply
# Mar 16 2004 at 9:23 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591801678987
344 posts
I went from "scowl" to "apprehensive" when my Agnostic Half-Elf Bard put on the Erudite illusion, so perhaps you meant "If you follow a religion that the evil NPCs at the port don't care for, then the mask won't make you non-KOS." Have you even tried the thing? And if so, how did you get up to 15 (to be able to use it) without learning that religion effects faction?
▲ Page top
RE: Good for OT hunting
QuoteReply
# May 11 2003 at 6:19 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591787483521
4 posts
My agnostic Erudite magician can walk about the outpost and sell/bank without being attacked. Unless you're religious, this mask would let you do the same.

there is not just Eru,DE,Ikky,Gnome
there is also Barb,High Elf,Vah Shir, and also Halfing

High Elf is quested in kith
Vah Shir no drop for Ssra Temple ima pretty sure
Halfing dropped in chardok
Barb-not sure where its drops but not only does it give the very rare barb illusion but stats are UBER nice

there are other ones too maybe

Erudite-4k ish Ikky-3k ish on tribunal
and as far as gnome goes HAHA no longer drops from Sleepers Tomb just saw a guy pay 225k the other day for it to put it on his twink 27 rogue HAHAHA

# Aug 20 2002 at 1:33 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592759392552
Scholar
627 posts
When I'm in Erudite form, I can see fine. It gets a little darker than when in Halfling or Iksar form but I can run through Toxx or Feerrott easily.

"Effect looks like crap" ? No way.. the site of a duel wielding big forehead Erudite.. uber :)

edit: here's a shot when I'm in Erudite illusion:
http://www.eatricezone.com/eq/14.jpg

I should've taken a shot outdoors for better lighting.. oh well.

# Apr 13 2002 at 9:25 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1593361662060
196 posts
There is also the halfling mask that drops in Chardok, the High elf mask quested for in Kith forest and the barbarian mask from the Avatar of War in Kael.
If you want more spell casting, check out Mrylokar's armor that drops in KC and OS. There are various other clicky items that rogues can put to good use scattered around...I won't list them here - thats what a premium account is for :)

#Anonymous, Posted: Aug 12 2001 at 4:57 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) whoever posted these prices they are smoking crack. This is a very rare drop in Charsis and is worth at least 9k. If you are lucky enough to get it for less then take the foo for what he's got
#Anonymous, Posted: Aug 04 2001 at 1:29 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) if anybody on Saryrn has one of these to sell.. I'll buy it.. send a tell to Yenzo and let me know. have been lookin for one for a while now, and can't find one anywhere. thanks
#REDACTED, Posted: Jul 12 2001 at 4:06 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) WTB Mask of Obtenebration on the Tunare Server! Paying 1,400pp for it. Send tells! (Or just reply to this message hehe)

QuoteReply
# Jan 12 2002 at 12:24 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591763808077
Scholar
17 posts
Not sure about the Tunare server, but if you find one for sale, which is kinda rare, on the CT server, they are only about 3 - 5k. They are a bit more expensive than the other masks, but then again they are harder to get. I know about 6 rogues and 3 bards that have these masks and only one that uses it. The rest of them just have it as a status symbol.

# Dec 02 2002 at 11:03 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591783979785
6 posts
I have always been under the impression that something is "worth" whatever someone else is willing to pay for it. That being said, I bought one of these for 1500pp in the bazzar. This item, in my eyes, is not "worth" much more than that.

BAH
QuoteReply
# Dec 08 2001 at 3:40 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591772753089
16 posts
Why do people jack up the price on an item that only 2 classes can use? I be a rogue and the only reason I want it is to look like and Erudite (duh hehe). Sure it's a rare drop but good lord 9k JUST to look like an Erudite come on people have a heart.
▲ Page top
RE: BAH
QuoteReply
# Mar 16 2004 at 9:27 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591801678987
344 posts
When one's race can alter their faction in major cities (for example, an Agnostic DE Rogue getting into Erudin for something, or an Agnostic Half-Elf Bard getting into The Overthere's port), I think that "just looking like an Erudite" means more than simple asthetics.
▲ Page top
